text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm accompanying Daitaku Helios<n>and Mejiro
Palmer to the concert<n>venue today.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After being invited to be a guest<n>performer by the
famous international<n>singer N.B., Daitaku Helios's
plan to<n>hype up Japan grew to a global scale.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the new Operation:<n>Get the World
Hyped, I decide to<n>attend the event myself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gahhh, I'm so excited! Are we there<n>yet?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, what's with this traffic?<n>Wait, it goes all
the way to the<n>venue?! NOOO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is bad... What did the concert<n>organizer say
when you called,<n>Trainer?
choice_data_list:
If we don't make it in time, they'll have to cancel
your guest appearance...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! It's so over...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, we can just run there!
choice_data_list: All the way to the venue?! That's really far!
All the way to the venue?! That's really far!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Facts! But if I don't show up on time,that's the biggest yikes of them all!I've gotta get my smile toeveryone, so there's no choice but to run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now we're talkin'! Come on, Trainer!<n>Let's get
running!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆ Here we go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! This place is faaar! Keeprunning, Palmer! And how's myproducer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff! You don't have to... tell metwice! We'll match your pace, sodon't push yourself too hard, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Passerby
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me! You're the Hype<n>Channel producer,
right? I love what<n>you guys do! You can use my
bicycle<n>if you like!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thanks a bunch! You seriously<n>saved our
producer! Oh, and a new<n>legend's about to be
born today, so<n>stay tuned to the channel!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wheeze! Huff... Pant... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: We—wheeze...—made it!

text_block_list.name: Concert Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! Here, sit down and<n>catch your
breath!

text_block_list.name: Concert Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Um... Do you think you'll still be able<n>to perform? I
don't want to push you<n>if you're not up to it.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Aha... That's nice of you! But...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I got this! I wanna perform!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
There are people out there who feel<n>happier just
by looking at my smile.<n>They said seeing me
makes them<n>feel better.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
After hearing that, there's nothing I<n>wanna do
more than go smile my<n>heart out and cheer
everyone up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm an Umamusume!<n>Performing at a
concert right after<n>doing a full-out sprint is nothing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: N.B.
text_block_list.text:
That’s the spirit! What did I tell you?<n>These girls
got it.

text_block_list.name: Concert Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, N.B... Hehe, you're so right. Her<n>smile's
absolutely dazzling.

text_block_list.name: N.B.
text_block_list.text: Come on, girls! It's showtime!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Showtime!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the reason Daitaku Helios's<n>smile brings
joy to so many people is<n>because she sincerely
wants it to.<n>And that desire fuels her when she
runs.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
DJ Helios is in the house! C'mon,<n>everybody! Say
heeey!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she starts her set, there's no hint<n>of
exhaustion whatsoever in her<n>smile.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The concert is broadcast around the<n>world, and
her happy face trends<n>across the globe for being
as "bright<n>as the sun."

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wait, it was broadcast on satellite TV?And the whole world saw it? Thatmeans... my smile went out intospace! That's straight up outta this world!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When people see the pictures,<n>Daitaku Helios's
sprint to the venue<n>becomes as hot a topic as the
concert<n>itself.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Look! Everyone who saw me is<n>smiling! You
know what this means,<n>right? Operation: Get the
World<n>Hyped was a total success!

text_block_list.name: Helios and Palmer
text_block_list.text: Waheeey! ☆
